mapper.sql: alevel_question_material_ref_id, alevel_question_id, material_type, relation_type, display_mode, alevel_source_file_id, alevel_pdf_page_id, alevel_content_block_id, alevel_asset_id, source_page_no, source_bbox_json, title, caption_html, caption_text, structure_json, match_status, match_confidence, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_question_material_ref WHERE alevel_question_material_ref_id = #{materialRefId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_question_material_ref WHERE alevel_question_id = #{questionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_question_material_ref_id ASC
SELECT FROM alevel_question_material_ref WHERE alevel_pdf_page_id = #{pdfPageId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_question_material_ref_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alevel_question_material_ref ( alevel_question_id, material_type, relation_type, display_mode, alevel_source_file_id, alevel_pdf_page_id, alevel_content_block_id, alevel_asset_id, source_page_no, source_bbox_json, title, caption_html, caption_text, structure_json, match_status, match_confidence, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{alevelQuestionId}, #{materialType}, #{relationType}, #{displayMode}, #{alevelSourceFileId}, #{alevelPdfPageId}, #{alevelContentBlockId}, #{alevelAssetId}, #{sourcePageNo}, #{sourceBboxJson}, #{title}, #{captionHtml}, #{captionText}, #{structureJson}, #{matchStatus}, #{matchConfidence}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_question_material_ref SET alevel_question_id = #{alevelQuestionId}, material_type = #{materialType}, relation_type = #{relationType}, display_mode = #{displayMode}, alevel_source_file_id = #{alevelSourceFileId}, alevel_pdf_page_id = #{alevelPdfPageId}, alevel_content_block_id = #{alevelContentBlockId}, alevel_asset_id = #{alevelAssetId}, source_page_no = #{sourcePageNo}, source_bbox_json = #{sourceBboxJson}, title = #{title}, caption_html = #{captionHtml}, caption_text = #{captionText}, structure_json = #{structureJson}, match_status = #{matchStatus}, match_confidence = #{matchConfidence}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE alevel_question_material_ref_id = #{alevelQuestionMaterialRefId}
